| group1 = Main topics | list1 = * [[Aarti|Ārati]] * [[Bhajan]] * [[Darshan (Indian religions)|Darshan]] * [[Hindu deities|Deities]] * [[List of Hindu festivals|Festivals]] * [[Homa (ritual)|Homa]] ([[Yajna]]) * [[Kirtan]] * [[Mantra]] * [[Murti]] * [[Tilaka]] * [[Utsava]] * [[Vrata]] * [[Yatra]]
| group2 = Rituals | list2 = {{Navbox |child |groupstyle=background:#FFC569;font-weight:normal; | group1 = [[Puja (Hinduism)|Puja]] | list1 = * [[Abhisheka]] * [[Bhog]] * [[Panchamakara]] * [[Panchamrita]] * [[Parikrama]] * [[Pranāma]] * [[Prasada]] * [[Pushpanjali]] | group2 = [[Homa (ritual)|Homa]] | list2 = * [[Yajna]] * [[Agnicayana]] * [[Agnihotra]] * [[Agnikaryam]] * [[Aupasana]] * [[Dhuni]] * [[Kamyakarma]] * [[Pravargya]] * [[Purushamedha]] * [[Putrakameshti]] * [[Viraja Homa]] | group3 = Other | list3 = * [[Achamana]] * [[Blessing#Hinduism|Ashirvada]] * [[Ashvamedha]] * [[Karmkand|Karmakāṇḍa]] * [[Kumbhabhishekham]] * [[Nityakarma]] * [[Ngejot]] * [[Panchayatana puja]] * [[Prana Pratishtha]] * [[Sandhyavandanam]] * [[Shuddhi (Hinduism)|Shuddhi]] * [[Śrauta]] * [[Tarpana]] * [[Upakarma]] }}
| group3 = {{hlist|[[Prayer in Hinduism|Prayer]]|[[Dhyana in Hinduism|Meditation]]}} | list3 = *[[Ajapa japa]] *[[Bhajan]] *[[Brahmamuhurta]] *[[Jagarana]] *[[Jai Shri Ram]] *[[Japa]] *[[Kirtan]] *[[Om]] *[[Sandhyavandanam]] *[[Shaktipat|Śaktipāta]] *[[Stotra]] *[[Third eye]] *[[Yoga]]
| group4 = [[Mantra]]s | list4 = * [[Gayatri Mantra]] * [[Hare Krishna (mantra)|Hare Krishna]] * [[Om]] * [[Om Namah Shivaya]] * [[Om Namo Narayanaya]]
| group5 = Objects | list5 = * [[Puja thali]] * [[Altar#Hinduism|Altar]] * [[Banalinga]] * [[Banana leaf]] * [[Biruda]] * [[Coconut]] * [[Dhunachi]] * [[Dhuni]] * [[Dhupa]] * [[Diya (lamp)|Diya]] * [[Fly-whisk|Cāmara]] * [[Garland]] * [[Ghanta]] * [[Joss stick|Agarabattī]] * [[Kalasha]] * [[Kamandalu]] * [[Khirapat]] * [[Kindi (vessel)|Kindi]] * [[Kolam]] * [[Moolavar|Mulavar]] * [[Paduka]] * [[Litter (vehicle)|Palki]] * [[Panchamrita]] * [[Pandal]] * [[Pinda (riceball)|Pinda]] * [[Japamala|Prayer beads]] * [[Rangoli]] * [[Shankha]] * [[Tilaka|Tilakamu]] * [[Utsavar]] * [[Upanayana|Yajnopavitam]]
| group6 = Materials | list6 = * [[Agarwood]] * [[Alta (dye)|Alta]] * [[Camphor]] * [[Charu]] * [[Ghee]] * [[Incense in India|Incense]] * [[Kumkuma]] * [[Tagetes|Marigold]] * [[Milk]] * [[Panakam]] * [[Panchagavya]] * [[Rudraksha]] * [[Sandalwood|Candana]] * [[Sindoor|Sindūra]] * [[Soma (drink)|Soma]] * [[Ocimum tenuiflorum|Tulasi]] * [[Turmeric]] * [[Vibhuti]]
| group7 = Instruments | list7 = * [[Dholak]] * [[Pump organ#Harmonium|Harmonium]] * [[Taal (instrument)|Karatalas]] * [[Khol]] * [[Manjira]] * [[Mridangam]] * [[Tabla]] * [[Veena]]

| group9 = Places | list9 = * [[Ashram]] * [[Dhwaja Stambha|Dhvajastambham]] * [[Ghat]] * [[Temple tank]] * [[Matha]] * [[Hindu temple|Temple]] * [[Hindu pilgrimage sites|Pilgrimage sites]]
| group10 = Roles | list10 = * [[Guru]] * [[Pandit]] * [[Pujari]] * [[Purohita]] * [[Rishi]] * [[Sadhu]] * [[Sannyasa]] * [[Sant (religion)|Sant]] * [[Satguru]] * [[Swami]] * [[Yogi]] * ''[[:Category:Titles and occupations in Hinduism|more...]]''
| group11 = Sacred animals | list11 = * [[Cattle_in_religion_and_mythology#Sacred_status_of_cow|Cow]] * [[Ashva|Horse]] * [[Nāga]]
| group12 = Sacred plants | list12 = {{Navbox |child |groupstyle=background:#FFC569;font-weight:normal; | group1 = Trees | list1 = * [[Akshayavata]] * [[Saraca asoca|Ashoka]] * [[Banyan]] * [[Neolamarckia cadamba|Kadamba]] * [[Kalpavriksha]] * [[Nyctanthes arbor-tristis|Parijata]] * [[Ficus religiosa|Peepal]] * [[Sacred groves of India|Sacred groves]] | group2 = Fruits and other plants | list2 = * [[Aegle marmelos|Bael]] * [[Desmostachya bipinnata|Kusha grass]] * [[Nelumbo nucifera|Lotus]] * [[Tulasi in Hinduism|Tulasi]] ([[Tulasi Vrindavana]]) }}
| group13 = See also | list13 = * [[Firewalking]] * [[Samskara (rite of passage)|Samskara]] * [[Temple dance]]
}}<noinclude> {{Documentation}} </noinclude>
